sections.sectionTitle: Numei tawh a Mawhte tungah Thukhenna

verses.text: Note lakah numei tawh paktatna nasia mahmahin, lawkite nangawn a gamtatlohte na gamtatna uh hong kigen a, mi khat in ama nukik nangawn a luppihna thu ka za hi
Tua bang kimlai bangci kisaktheih ding na hi uh hiam? Note na dah mahmah ding uh hizaw a, tua bang mite pen note lak panin na hepkhiat ding uh ahi hi

Note tawh ka pumpi-in ka hong omkhop loh hangin note tawh ka lungsim hong omkhawm a, ka pumpi-in note tawh a hong omkhawm zah mah bangin tua bang a gamta mite tungah i Topa Jesuh' min tawh mawhsakna thu ka khen khinzo hi
Note na kikhop khawm uh ciangin i Topa Jesuh Khrih vangliatna in eite hong ompih ahih manin, note tawh ka lungsimin ka hong omkhawm hi
Topa' Ni hong tun' ciangin tua bang mite' kha in hotkhiatna a ngahtheihna dingin Satan in amau pumpi a gimsak dingin na piakhia ta un
Note lakah hih bang gamtatna om napi-in na kisaktheih uh dahhuai mahmah hi. Silngo themkhat in annel lompi a pawmsak theih lamtak theilo na hi uh hiam

Note na siangtho theihna dingun mawhna silngo luite na paikhia un. Tua hi leh silngo sawhloh annel lom thak na hi ding uh a, zong ahi takpi mah na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam ci leh i Paisan Pawi hun hong tungta a, eite' Paisan Tuuno ahi Khrih kigo khinzo ta hi
Tua ahih ciangin mawhna leh gitlohna ahi silngo lui a kisawh anlum tawh Paisan Pawi bawlloin, silngo a kisawhlo, siangthona leh thutakna tawh bawlzaw ni
Lai ka hong gelhna sungah, numei tawh a paktat mite tawh na kikholhlohna ding uh ka hong gen hi

Tua bang ka hong cih ciangin numei tawh a paktat, a huaiham, a guta, milim a bia lawkite tawh na kikhawl kei un, ka cihnopna hilo hi. Tuate tawh kikhawllo ding ci lehang, leitung panin paikhia un, cihna suak ding hi

Tua ka hong laigelhna sungah ka cihnopna pen, thu upna sungah unau khat hi hang, ci napi-in numei tawh a paktat, a huaiham, milim a bia, mi gensia, zukham, ahih kei leh a guta theite tawh kikhawl kei un, cihnopna ahi hi. Tua bang mite tawh an ne ding nangawnin zong na tukhawm kei un

Tua bang a pualam mite mawhsakin thu ka khen ding kei' nasep hilo hi. Pasian in amaute' thu khen ngawn ding hi. Ahi zongin note in na pawlpih uh mite tungah thu na khen ding uh ahi hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Note lak panin migilopa na lakhia un,” na ci hi.
